In versions below both 7.1.2-19 and 6.9.13-44, the viff encoder contains an integer truncation/wraparound issue on 32-bit builds that could trigger an out of bounds heap write, potentially causing a crash. This issue has been fixed in versions 6.9.13-44 and 7.1.2-19.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00434, "percentile": 0.34562}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-v67w-737x-v2c9", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-13T19:09:58Z",
